Notice Of Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Leanne Solish of Glancy Prongay & Murray, LLP telephone number 310-201-9150 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Laurie Trombella.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LAURIE TROMBELLA'S Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Without Prejudice is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
